name: df
description: Report file system disk space usage

name: -h
--human-readable
options.description: Print sizes in a human-readable form

name: -H
--si
options.description: Like -h but use powers of 1000 not 1024

name: -i
--inodes
options.description: List inode usage instead of block usage

name: -a
--all
options.description: Include pseudo, duplicate, and inaccessible file systems

args.name: file
args.description: Show the file system containing each file
